'''zawïfjïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygidicranid|pygidicranid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygidicranid|pygidicranid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| zawïfjïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zæwïfjïfth || zæwïfjïfj || zæwïfjïfsh || zæwïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zawïfwïfjïfth || zawïfwïfjïfj || zawïfwïfjïfsh || zawïfwïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zawïfjïfth || zawïfjïfj || zawïfjïfsh || zawïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zawïffjïffth || zawïffjïffj || zawïffjïffsh || zawïffjïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zawïfjïfïf || zawïfjïfïf || zawïfjïfïf || zawïfjïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || zawïfjïfth || zawïfjïfj || zawïfjïfsh || zawïfjïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zawïfjïfïfl || zawïfjïfïfl || zawïfjïfïfl || zawïfjïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zawïfjïfïfïf || zawïfjïfïfïf || zawïfjïfïfïf || zawïfjïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || zawïfjïfïfn || zawïfjïfïfn || zawïfjïfïfn || zawïfjïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zawïfjïfïforo || zawïfjïfïforo || zawïfjïfïforo || zawïfjïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
